title: Ndlela ya Ndzhaka ku Tsemakanya Swifundzha swa Afrika-Dzonga
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.eyebrow: Matimu ya Grade 5 - Xiyenge xa le Xikarhi (Intermediate Phase)
slides.title: Ndlela ya Ndzhaka ku Tsemakanya Swifundzha swa Afrika-Dzonga
slides.lead: A hi fambeni ku tsemakanya swifundzha hinkwaswo swa kaye, kutani hi kuma tindhawu leti hlawulekeke, mintsheketo ni mikhuva leyi nga ya hina hinkwerhu.

media.alt: Mepe wo saseka wa Afrika-Dzonga wu ni marhavi lama kombisaka tindhawu ta ndzhaka ku tsemakanya tiko hinkwaro.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amukela swichudeni naswona u hlamusela mhaka ya 'ndlela ya ndzhaka' - riendzo ro anakanyiwa leri yimaka etindhaweni to hlawuleka ku tsemakanya Afrika-Dzonga hinkwayo. Vutisa: xana ku ni loyi a tshameke a endzela musiyamu, xiako xa khale, xihlovo xa ntsundzuxo kumbe ndhawu ya ntumbuluko? Ndlela ya ndzhaka yi hlanganisa tindhawu leti. Loko dyondzo yi hela, swichudeni swi fanele swi kota ku boxa tindhawu ta ndzhaka eswifundzheni swo hambana ni ku vula leswaku ha yini hi ti sirhelela.

slides.title: Ndzhaka i yini?
slides.lead: Ndzhaka i swilo hinkwaswo leswi hi swi kumaka eka nkarhi lowu hundzeke naswona hi lava ku swi hlayisela nkarhi lowu taka.

blocks.text: **Ndzhaka** i swilo leswi hi swi kumaka eka vanhu lava hanyeke emahlweni ka hina. Swi nga va swilo leswi hi swi khumbaka, ku fana ni swiako swa khale ni switirho, ni swilo leswi hi nga swi khumbiki, ku fana ni tinsimu, mintsheketo, tindzimi ni tindlela to sweka. Ndzhaka yi hi pfuna ku tiva leswaku hi vamani ni laha hi humaka kona.

items: **Ndzhaka ya ntumbuluko** - tintshava, mikwati, milambu ni swiharhi leswi hlawulekeke.
**Ndzhaka ya ndhavuko** - swiako, switsundzuxo, vutshila ni swilo swa khale.
**Ndzhaka leyi hanyaka** - tindzimi, vuyimbeleri, mincino, swakudya ni mitlangu.

media.alt: Swifaniso swinharhu swo olova: ntshava, xiako xa khale ni ngoma, swi kombisa tinxaka tinharhu ta ndzhaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nyika swikombiso leswi twisisekaka eka xaka rin'wana ni rin'wana leswaku swichudeni swa Grade 5 swi swi vona hi mianakanyo: ntumbuluko (Table Mountain), ndhavuko (Union Buildings), leyi hanyaka (ku yimbelela ka isicathamiya, braai ya ndyangu, ku hlaya switori swa khale). Kandziyisa leswaku ndzhaka leyi hanyaka yi hanya eka vanhu, ku nga ri eka xiako. Rhamba swichudeni ku boxa xilo xin'we xa ndzhaka ya ndyangu wa vona.

slides.eyebrow: Tindhawu leti misava hinkwayo yi ti sirhelelaka
slides.title: Tindhawu ta Ndzhaka ya Misava ta Afrika-Dzonga
slides.lead: Tin'wana ta tindhawu ta hina ti hlawuleke ngopfu lerova misava hinkwayo yi pfuna ku ti hlayisa.

blocks.text: **Ndhawu ya Ndzhaka ya Misava** i ndhawu leyi hlawuriweke hi nhlangano lowu vuriwaka **UNESCO** hikuva yi ni nkoka eka vanhu hinkwavo emisaveni, ku nga ri tiko rin'we ntsena. Afrika-Dzonga yi ni tindhawu ta kwalomu ka **khume** ta muxaka lowu, leti hangalakeke eswifundzheni. Eka ndlela ya hina hi ta endzela tin'wana ta tona.

items: Tin'wana ti hlawuleriwe ntumbuluko, ku fana ni tintshava ta le Kapa ni Drakensberg.
Tin'wana ti hlawuleriwe matimu, ku fana ni Mapungubwe ni Robben Island.
Ku va eka nxaxamelo swi vula leswaku ndhawu yi sirheleliwe vana va nkarhi lowu taka.

media.alt: Xikombiso xo rhendzeleka xi ni misava endzeni, ku fana ni xifungho xa Ndzhaka ya Misava.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlayisa nhlamuselo yi olova: UNESCO i ntlawa eka Nhlangano wa Matiko-xaka lowu endlaka nxaxamelo wo hlawuleka wa tindhawu ta nkoka swinene emisaveni. A wu lavi swichudeni swi tsundzuka nomboro leyi kongomeke - mhaka i leswaku Afrika-Dzonga yi fuwile hi tindhawu to tano. [SME] Ndzi kombela mi tiyisisa nomboro ya sweswi ya Tindhawu ta Ndzhaka ya Misava ta UNESCO ta Afrika-Dzonga (a ti ri khume hi 2023) dyondzo yi nga si sungula.

slides.title: Ndhawu ya ndzhaka yin'we eka xifundzha xin'wana ni xin'wana
slides.lead: Swifundzha swa kaye, tindhawu ta ndhuma ta kaye to endzela eka ndlela ya hina.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - mikwati leyi nga ni marhambu ya khale swinene ya vanhu.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - mfumo wo sungula wa Afrika-Dzonga ni mhelembe wa nsuku.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: Robben Island - khotso laha Nelson Mandela a khomiweke kona.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Tintshava ta Drakensberg - swidzeni swa magidi ya swifaniso swa Vasan.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: Qunu na Mthatha - tindhawu ta vuntwananeni bya Nelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Ndzhaka ya Vasan ni swifaniso swa khale leswi vatliweke eribyeni eKaroo yo oma.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Swimitana swa Vabasotho ni Vredefort Dome leyi nga ekusuhi.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: Taung, laha nkolo wa n'wana wa khale wu kumiweke kona.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Tintshava ta Makhonjwa ta Barberton - swin'wana swa maribye ya khale swinene emisaveni.

slides.notes: Leyi i sileyidi yo langutisa hinkwaswo. Hlaya xifundzha xin'wana ni xin'wana ni ndhawu ya xona hi rito ra le henhla, naswona u komba kwalomu laha yi nga kona eka mepe wo anakanyiwa (kumbe mepe wa khwatini loko u ri na wona). Byela swichudeni leswaku tisileyidi leti landzelaka ti ta katsakanya tin'wana ta tona. U nga vutisa swichudeni ku hlawula ndhawu leyi swi lavaka ku yi endzela ngopfu ni ku vula leswaku hikwalaho ka yini. [SME] Tiyisisa leswaku mpimanyeto wa swifundzha ni tindhawu wu fanela ntlawa wa n'wina; xifundzha xin'wana ni xin'wana xi ni tindhawu to tala ta ndzhaka naswona vadyondzisi va nga ha lava swikombiso swa muganga.

slides.title: Cradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Ntlawa wa mikwati ekusuhi ni Johannesburg laha vativi va sayense va kumeke marhambu ya khale swinene ya ndyangu wa vanhu emisaveni.

blocks.text: Eka **Sterkfontein Caves** vativi va sayense va cele marhambu ya khale - **swiendzo swa khale (fossils)** leswi nga hundzuka maribye - swa vanhu vo sungula lava hanyeke miningi wa malembe leyi hundzeke. Swikumo swa ndhuma swi katsa nkolo lowu vitaniwaka 'Mrs Ples' ni xitsuku lexi heleleke lexi vitaniwaka 'Little Foot'. Hi yona mhaka ndhawu leyi yi vuriwaka *Cradle of Humankind*.

items: Cradle i laha n'wana a etlelaka kona - kutani leyi yi fana ni ndhawu yo velekiwa ka vanhu.
I Ndhawu ya Ndzhaka ya Misava hikuva yi hlamusela ntsheketo wa vanhu hinkwavo.
Wa ha kota ku endzela mikwati ni musiyamu namuntlha.

media.alt: Xifaniso xa nkwati wa le hansi ka misava wu ni nkolo wa fossil endzeni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela 'fossil' hi ku olova: marhambu lama hundzukaka ribye hi ku famba ka nkarhi wo leha swinene. Little Foot na Mrs Ples swi endla sayense yi vonaka yi ri ya ntiyiso eka swichudeni. Hlayisa mhaka ya nkarhi wa khale swinene yi olovile - 'khale swinene, ka ha ri ni khale ku tlula leswi hi nga swi anakanyaka.' Hlanganisa ni khadi ra sileyidi 5. [SME] Malembe ma oloxisiwile hi vomu; tiyisisa tinomboro leti mudyondzisi a nga engetelaka hi rito.

slides.title: Mfumo wa Mapungubwe
slides.lead: Khale swinene, ehenhla ka ntshava lowu ririmuka ehenhla en'walungwini wa le kule, a ku ri ni ntsindza wa mfumo wo sungula wa Afrika-Dzonga.

blocks.text: Kwalomu ka malembe ya 700 ku ya eka 800 lama hundzeke, **Mapungubwe** a ku ri mfumo wo tirha laha vanhu a va rima, va hlayisa tihomu ni ku xavisa nsuku ni nhlonge (ivory) ni matiko ya le kule. Hosi a yi tshama ehenhla ka ntshava wo hlawuleka. Endzhaku, vavuli va swilo swa khale (archaeologists) va kume swilo swo saseka swa nsuku kwalaho, ku katsa **mhelembe lowutsongo wa nsuku**.

items: Swi kombisa leswaku mimfumo leyikulu ya Xintu a yi ri kona laha khale swinene Vazungu va nga si fika.
Mhelembe wa nsuku sweswi i xikombiso xa ndhuma xa matimu ya Afrika-Dzonga.
Mapungubwe i Ndhawu ya Ndzhaka ya Misava lomu ndzilekanani na Zimbabwe na Botswana.

media.alt: Ntshava wo ririmuka ehenhla wu ni xivumbeko xitsongo xa mhelembe wa nsuku emahlweni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Sileyidi leyi yi lulamisa vunwa lebyi tolovelekeke hi ku kombisa mfumo wa Xintu wa matimba ni wo fuwa lowu tshameke kahle khale swinene ku nga si fika ku fuma ka valawuri va matiko-mambe. Kandziyisa vuxavisi (nsuku ni nhlonge swi famba kule hi lwandle) ni mhelembe wa nsuku tanihi rifuwo. Swichudeni swa Grade 6 va dyondza Mapungubwe hi vuenti endzhaku, kutani u byala mbewu. Hlayisa malembe ma oloxisiwile ('kwalomu ka malembe ya 700-800 lama hundzeke').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Xihlala xitsongo elwandle ekusuhi ni Cape Town lexi veke khotso ra ndhuma - naswona xi ve xikombiso xa ntshunxeko.

blocks.text: Malembe yo tala **Robben Island** a ku ri khotso. Hi nkarhi wa apartheid, varhangeri lava a va lwela timfanelo to ringana a va pfaleriwa laha, ekule ni mindyangu ya vona. **Nelson Mandela** u hete malembe yo tala eselweni leritsongo exihlaleni a nga si ntshunxiwa naswona endzhaku a va presidente wo sungula wa Afrika-Dzonga loyi a hlawuriweke hi ndlela ya xidemokrasi.

items: Namuntlha i musiyamu lowu dyondzisaka vaendzi hi nyimpi ya ntshunxeko.
Van'wana va vakombisi i vabohiwa va khale lava avelanaka mintsheketo ya vona.
Swi hi tsundzuxa ku tekela enhlokweni ntshunxeko ni timfanelo leti hi nga na tona namuntlha.

media.alt: Xihlala xitsongo xi ni xibani exikarhi ka lwandle, ku ri ni Table Mountain ekule.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Khoma mhaka ya apartheid hi vukheta ni hi ku olova eka Grade 5: van'wana a va khomiwa hi ndlela yo ka yi nga lulamanga hikwalaho ka muhlovo wa nhlonge ya vona, naswona vanhu va xivindzi va tirhile ku cinca sweswo. Vekisa Robben Island tanihi ndhawu ya gome ni ya ntshembo. Hlanganisa ni Siku ra Ntshunxeko / Nelson Mandela loko swichudeni swi n'wi tiva. Papalata swi vulavuriwaka hi vuenti; kongomisa eka xivindzi ni nkoka wa ntshunxeko.

slides.title: Swifaniso swa Maribye swa Drakensberg
slides.lead: Ehenhla etintshaveni ta Drakensberg ku ni magidi ya swifaniso leswi endliweke hi Vasan khale swinene.

blocks.text: **uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** i ntlhandlha wa tintshava to leha swinene wa Afrika-Dzonga. Mikwati ni swidzeni swa yona swi ni magidi ya **swifaniso swa maribye** leswi endliweke hi **Vasan** lava a va ri vahloti ni vatlheriwa. A va peinta vanhu, tinhlfu (eland) ni tidyondzo ta vona hi ku tirhisa mibala ya ntumbuluko leyi humaka eka maribye, swimila ni swiharhi.

items: Vito uKhahlamba hi isiZulu ri vula 'khokholo ra magonga'.
Swifaniso swi ni madzana ni tanihi magidi ya malembe.
I Ndhawu ya Ndzhaka ya Misava hikwalaho ka ntumbuluko wa yona ni vutshila bya yona bya khale.

media.alt: Khumbi ra nkwati ri ni swifaniso swa maribye swa Vasan swa nhlfu ni munhu la tsutsumaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Nghenisa Vasan tanihi vanhu vo sungula va Afrika ya le dzongeni ni tanihi vatshila ni vatsheketi va vutshila. Hlamusela ndlela leyi peinti a yi endliwa ha yona hi swilo swa ntumbuluko (ochre, malahla, mati ya swimila, mafurha ya swiharhi). Nhlfu (eland) a ku ri xiharhi xa nkoka swinene eka tidyondzo ta Vasan. Khoma ndzhaka ya Vasan hi xichavo - swifaniso leswi i swo kwetsima eka mindyangu ya switukulwana. Hlanganisa ni swifaniso leswi vatliweke swa Northern Cape eka sileyidi leyi landzelaka.

slides.eyebrow: Tindhawu ta vuntlhanu, vutsevu ni vunkombo
slides.title: Ku tsemakanya Karoo ni Free State
slides.lead: Tindhawu tinharhu tin'wana eka ndlela ya hina - eEastern Cape, eNorthern Cape ni eFree State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Switlhamu leswi rhihaka laha Nelson Mandela a kuleke kona. Musiyamu eMthatha wu hlamusela ntsheketo wa vutomi byakwe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Xitlhamu lexi funengetiweke hi swifaniso swa khale leswi vatliweke eribyeni, leswi hlayisiwaka hi mindyangu ya Vasan ni Vakhoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - Ximitana xa Vabasotho
blocks.text: Musiyamu lowu hanyaka laha u nga vonaka tindlu ta ndhavuko ta Vabasotho leti nga ni makhumbi lama peintiweke hi ku saseka.

media.alt: Swiendlakalo swinharhu switsongo: switlhamu leswi rhihaka, ribye leri vatliweke, ni ngula yo rhendzeleka leyi peintiweke.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Tindhawu leti tinharhu ti anamisa ndlela ku ya eka swifundzha swo tala ni tinxaka to tala ta ndzhaka: ndhawu yo velekiwa ka munhu (Eastern Cape), vutshila bya khale (swifaniso leswi vatliweke swa Northern Cape, leswi vatliweke eribyeni ku nga ri ku peintiwa), ni ndzhaka leyi hanyaka eka ximitana lexi tirhaka (Free State). Hlamusela ku hambana exikarhi ka swifaniso swa maribye leswi peintiweke (KZN) ni swifaniso leswi vatliweke (Northern Cape). [SME] Siva tindhawu ta muganga ta Eastern Cape kumbe Free State loko ti fanela swichudeni swa n'wina.

slides.eyebrow: Tindhawu ta vunhungu ni ya vukaye
slides.title: Maribye ya khale ni n'wana wa khale
slides.lead: Tindhawu ta hina timbirhi to hetelela ta swifundzha ti ya eNorth West ni eMpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Hi 1924 nkolo wa fossil wa n'wana wa khale, lowu vuriwaka 'Taung Child', wu kumiwe laha. Wu pfune misava ku dyondza leswaku vanhu va sungurile eAfrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Tintshava ta Makhonjwa ti ni maribye man'wana ya khale swinene emisaveni - kwalomu ka 3 500 wa timiliyoni ta malembe - sweswi i Ndhawu ya Ndzhaka ya Misava.

blocks.heading: Nyiko yo engetela - Gauteng
blocks.text: Freedom Park ni Constitution Hill en'walungwini swi tsundzuxa nyimpi ya timfanelo ta vanhu ni demokrasi.

media.alt: Nkolo wutsongo wa fossil ekusuhi ni tintshava ta khale leti nga ni swiyenge.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Taung yi hlanganisa ni mhaka ya Cradle of Humankind - Afrika-Dzonga yi le xikarhi ka ntsheketo wa masungulo ya vanhu. Barberton yi kombisa ndzhaka ya ntumbuluko ya muxaka wun'wana: maribye ya khale swinene. Khadi ra nyiko yo engetela ri ku pfumelela ku boxa tindhawu ta demokrasi ta Gauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Tiyisisa lembe ra ku kumiwa ka Taung Child (1924) ni vukhale bya ribye lebyi oloxisiweke (kwalomu ka 3 500 wa timiliyoni ta malembe) loko u swi vulavula hi rito.

slides.eyebrow: Ndzhaka leyi u nga yi twaka, u yi nantswa ni ku yi cina
slides.title: Ndzhaka leyi hanyaka ni Siku ra Ndzhaka
slides.lead: Hikwaswo ku nga ri ndzhaka yi tshama yi miyerile emusiyamu - yin'wana ya yona yi hanya eka leswi hi swi endlaka siku ni siku.

blocks.text: **Ndzhaka leyi hanyaka** yi hundziseriwa ku suka eka vakokwana ku ya eka vatswari ku ya eka vana. Yi katsa **tindzimi ta hina ta ximfumo ta 11**, tinsimu ni mincino ya hina, mintsheketo ya hina, swiambalo swa hina ni swakudya leswi hi swi rhandzaka. Lembe rin'wana ni rin'wana hi **24 Ndzhati (September)** Afrika-Dzonga yi tlangela **Siku ra Ndzhaka**, laha hi xiximaka mindhavuko ya hina hinkwayo yo hambana.

items: Vuyimbeleri ni mincino ku fana ni isicathamiya, mincino ya magumbutu (gumboot) ni amapiano.
Swakudya swo fana ni vuswa (pap), bunny chow, tikoeksister, umngqusho ni chakalaka.
Mintsheketo, switlangi swo dzunisa (izibongo) ni mitlangu leyi avelanaka exikarhi ka mindyangu.

media.alt: Tinoti ta vuyimbeleri, ngoma ni ndhengele wa swakudya swi yimela ndzhaka leyi hanyaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Endla leyi yi va sileyidi leyi katsaka swichudeni swinene. Kombela swichudeni ku avelana risimu, xakudya kumbe ntsheketo wa le kaya ka vona. Kandziyisa leswaku ndzhaka leyi hanyaka i ya vanhu hinkwavo naswona yi hambeta yi cinca - amapiano i ndzhaka leyintshwa leyi endliwaka sweswi. Hlamusela Siku ra Ndzhaka hi ku olova: holideyi ya vanhu hinkwavo yo tlangela mindhavuko ya hina hinkwayo swin'we. Tiyisisa xichavo eka ku hambana.

slides.eyebrow: Ha yini swi ri na nkoka
slides.title: Ku hlayisa ndzhaka ya hina
slides.lead: Ndzhaka i ya hina hinkwerhu, kutani hinkwerhu hi fanele hi pfuna ku yi sirhelela.

blocks.text: Loko swiako swa khale swi wa, swifaniso swa maribye swi phatanyisiwa, kumbe mintsheketo yi nga ha hlayiwi nakambe, ndzhaka yoleyo yi lahleka hilaha ku nga heriki. Hi yona mhaka hi nga ni **timusiyamu**, **switsundzuxo** ni milawu leyi sirhelelaka tindhawu to hlawuleka. Kambe vanhu va siku ni siku va pfuna nakambe - hi ku endzela, ku dyondza ni ku hundzisela leswi va swi tivaka.

items: U nga tshuki u khumba kumbe u onha vutshila bya maribye kumbe swilo swa khale.
Endzela timusiyamu ni tindhawu ta ndzhaka ku dyondza mintsheketo ya tona.
Yingisela vakulukumba naswona u hundzisela mintsheketo ya vona eka van'wana.

media.alt: Mavoko mambirhi ma khoma xiako xitsongo ni murhi hi ku olova, swi kombisa ku khathala hi ndzhaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tisa dyondzo eka mhaka ya yona ya 'kutani ke' - ndzhaka yi olova ku onhaka naswona yi nga lahleka. Hlanganisa switsundzuxo leswinharhu ni maendlelo ya ntiyiso eka riendzo ra xikolo. Tiyisisa xichavo eka tindhawu to kwetsima ku fana ni vutshila bya maribye bya Vasan. U nga vutisa swichudeni ku boxa xilo xin'we lexi va nga ta xi endla ku sirhelela ndzhaka. Leswi swi lulamisela swivutiso swo kambela.

slides.eyebrow: Makumu ya ndlela - a hi kambeleni
slides.title: Leswi hi swi dyondzeke eka ndlela
slides.lead: Hi tsemakanyile swifundzha hinkwaswo swa kaye kutani hi hlangana ni ndzhaka ya ntumbuluko, ya ndhavuko ni leyi hanyaka.

blocks.text: Ku suka eka mikwati ya **Cradle of Humankind** ku ya eka mfumo wa **Mapungubwe**, khotso ra **Robben Island** ni tintshava leti peintiweke ta **Drakensberg**, ndzhaka ya Afrika-Dzonga yi hlamusela ntsheketo wa vanhu va yona hinkwavo. Ndzhaka i ya vanhu hinkwavo, naswona un'wana ni un'wana a nga pfuna ku yi sirhelela.

blocks.question: Boxa tindhawu tinharhu to hambana ta ndzhaka naswona u vula leswaku yin'wana ni yin'wana yi le xifundzheni xihi.
Hlamusela ku hambana exikarhi ka ndzhaka ya ntumbuluko, ndzhaka ya ndhavuko ni ndzhaka leyi hanyaka. Nyika xikombiso xin'we xa yin'wana ni yin'wana.
Ha yini swi ri na nkoka ku hlayisa ndzhaka ya hina? Nyika swivangelo swimbirhi.

slides.notes: Tirhisa swivutiso swinharhu tanihi ntirho wo tsariwa kumbe mbulavurisano wa ntlawa. Xivutiso 1 xi kambela ku tsundzuka tindhawu ni swifundzha; xivutiso 2 xi kambela mhaka ya nkoka ya tinxaka tinharhu ta ndzhaka; xivutiso 3 xi kambela ku twisisa ha yini ndzhaka yi ri na nkoka. Ku averiwa ka timaki ku landzela xivumbeko xa CAPS xa Xiyenge xa le Xikarhi. Gimeta hi ku tsundzuxa swichudeni leswaku na vona i xiphemu xa ndzhaka leyi hanyaka ya Afrika-Dzonga.
